description_long: This adult pedestrian is depicted wearing a sporty, urban outfit consisting of a fitted jacket with a hood, layered over a high-collared shirt, and paired with slim athletic pants. The jacket features a two-tone design with contrasting panels and visible seam details, while the pants have reinforced knee sections and subtle accent lines. The figure is accessorized with large, round goggles resting on the forehead, adding a touch of personality and suggesting readiness for outdoor activity. The footwear is a pair of athletic sneakers with a modern, streamlined design. The individual has long hair styled back, with some volume and gentle waves, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall appearance is that of a young adult prepared for casual movement in an urban environment.
description: A sporty adult pedestrian in a fitted hooded jacket, athletic pants, and sneakers, accessorized with large goggles and long, styled hair. The look is modern and urban, suitable for city streets.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, goggles, facial features, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered jacket, and the sneaker design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, hair volume, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, jacket details, and sneaker shape.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic jacket with hood, high-collared shirt, slim athletic pants, and large goggles
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled back with gentle waves
